name: Wisconsin Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Wisconsin - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description: Wisconsin Nurse Aide Registry, P.O. Box 8916, Madison, WI 53708-8916

renewalCycle: No expiration, maintained through work verification every 2 years

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

mainEntity.name: How much does Wisconsin CNA endorsement cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: The endorsement application fee is $25. Additional costs may include background check fees.
No, fingerprints are generally not required for CNA endorsement in Wisconsin.

mainEntity.name: How long does it take to transfer my CNA certification to Wisconsin?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most endorsement applications take 2 to 4 Weeks.

mainEntity.name: Can I start working in Wisconsin while waiting?

acceptedAnswer.text: Check with the state board about temporary practice permits while your endorsement is being processed.
